items.label: Documents (ARROW)
items.how_to: Verify Airworthiness certificate, Registration, Operating handbook, Weight & balance, and Radio license (ARROW) are on board.
items.location: Glove compartment or side pocket

items.label: Fuel Quantity
items.how_to: Visually check fuel level through filler caps on each wing and compare with fuel gauges.
items.location: Wing fuel tanks â†’ Left and Right wing roots

items.label: Fuel Selector
items.how_to: Turn the fuel selector valve handle to the BOTH position.
items.location: Cabin floor â†’ Between front seats

items.label: Master Switch
items.how_to: Push both halves of the red master switch (BAT and ALT) to the ON (up) position.
items.location: Lower left instrument panel â†’ Below left side gauges

items.label: Fuel Gauges
items.how_to: Compare fuel gauge readings against visual inspection to confirm gauges are accurate.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Lower left cluster

items.label: Flaps
items.how_to: Move the flap lever fully up to retract the flaps to zero degrees.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Lower center, between pilot seats

items.label: Master Switch
items.how_to: Push both halves of the master switch (BAT and ALT) to the OFF (down) position.
items.location: Lower left instrument panel â†’ Below left side gauges

items.label: Walkaround Inspection
items.how_to: Walk around the aircraft checking control surfaces, tires, propeller, oil, fuel drains, pitot tube, and antennas.
items.location: Exterior â†’ Full aircraft walkaround

items.label: Preflight Inspection
items.how_to: Confirm all preflight checklist items have been completed and the aircraft is airworthy.
items.location: Cockpit â†’ Pilot seat

items.label: Seats, Belts, Harnesses
items.how_to: Adjust seat to reach full rudder pedal travel and lock the seat rail pin. Fasten seatbelt and shoulder harness.
items.location: Cockpit â†’ Pilot and passenger seats

items.label: Parking Brake
items.how_to: Pull the parking brake handle fully aft and push down to lock it in the set position.
items.location: Lower instrument panel â†’ Below center, pull handle

items.label: Avionics Master
items.how_to: Switch the avionics master toggle to the OFF (down) position to protect avionics during engine start.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Lower center, red toggle switch

items.label: Fuel Selector
items.how_to: Confirm the fuel selector valve handle is in the BOTH position.
items.location: Cabin floor â†’ Between front seats

items.label: Circuit Breakers
items.how_to: Visually inspect all circuit breakers to confirm none are popped out.
items.location: Lower left instrument panel â†’ Left side circuit breaker panel

items.label: Master Switch
items.how_to: Push both halves of the red master switch (BAT and ALT) to the ON (up) position.
items.location: Lower left instrument panel â†’ Below left side gauges

items.label: Beacon Light
items.how_to: Flip the beacon light switch to the ON position before starting the engine.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Left side, light switch cluster

items.label: Mixture
items.how_to: Push the red mixture knob fully forward to the RICH position.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Red knob, right of throttle

items.label: Carb Heat
items.how_to: Push the carb heat knob fully in to the COLD (off) position.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Center knob

items.label: Primer
items.how_to: Unlock the primer by turning it, pull out and push in 2-6 strokes depending on temperature, then lock it.
items.location: Lower left instrument panel â†’ Black knob with lock

items.label: Throttle
items.how_to: Advance the black throttle knob approximately 1/4 inch from the idle position.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Black knob, leftmost

items.label: Ignition / Starter
items.how_to: Turn the ignition key past BOTH to the START position and release when the engine fires.
items.location: Lower left instrument panel â†’ Key-operated ignition switch

items.label: Oil Pressure
items.how_to: Check that the oil pressure gauge needle moves into the green arc within 30 seconds of engine start.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Engine gauge cluster, left side

items.label: Avionics Master
items.how_to: Switch the avionics master toggle to the ON (up) position after the engine is running smoothly.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Lower center, red toggle switch

items.label: Radios / GPS
items.how_to: Set COM and NAV radio frequencies and configure GPS flight plan as needed.
items.location: Avionics stack â†’ Center instrument panel

items.label: Altimeter
items.how_to: Set the current local altimeter setting using the adjustment knob on the altimeter.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Flight instrument cluster, right of attitude indicator

items.label: Heading Indicator
items.how_to: Align the heading indicator with the magnetic compass using the adjustment knob.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Flight instrument cluster, below attitude indicator

items.label: Navigation Lights
items.how_to: Flip the navigation lights switch to ON.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Left side, light switch cluster

items.label: Taxi Clearance
items.how_to: Contact ground control on the appropriate frequency and request taxi clearance to the active runway.
items.location: Avionics stack â†’ COM1 or COM2 radio

items.label: Parking Brake
items.how_to: Push the parking brake handle forward to release the brakes.
items.location: Lower instrument panel â†’ Below center, push handle

items.label: Taxi Light
items.how_to: Flip the taxi light switch to ON before moving the aircraft.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Left side, light switch cluster

items.label: Brakes
items.how_to: After beginning to roll, tap both toe brakes to confirm they are functioning properly.
items.location: Rudder pedals â†’ Top of each pedal (toe brakes)

items.label: Gyroscopic Instruments
items.how_to: Verify heading indicator, attitude indicator, and turn coordinator respond correctly during turns.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Flight instrument cluster

items.label: Parking Brake
items.how_to: Pull the parking brake handle aft and push down to lock before the runup.
items.location: Lower instrument panel â†’ Below center, pull handle

items.label: Flight Controls
items.how_to: Move the yoke full left, right, forward, and aft to verify ailerons and elevator move freely and correctly.
items.location: Cockpit â†’ Yoke (control column)

items.label: Flight Instruments
items.how_to: Scan all six primary flight instruments to confirm proper indications.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Flight instrument cluster (six-pack)

items.label: Fuel Selector
items.how_to: Confirm the fuel selector valve handle is in the BOTH position.
items.location: Cabin floor â†’ Between front seats

items.label: Mixture
items.how_to: Push the red mixture knob fully forward to the RICH position.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Red knob, right of throttle

items.label: Elevator Trim
items.how_to: Set the trim wheel to the takeoff position, indicated by the takeoff range mark.
items.location: Cockpit â†’ Trim wheel between pilot seats, or on center console

items.label: Throttle
items.how_to: Advance throttle to 1700 RPM, then check magnetos and carb heat during runup.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Black knob, leftmost

items.label: Magnetos
items.how_to: Turn the ignition key from BOTH to LEFT, note RPM drop, return to BOTH, then switch to RIGHT. Max 125 RPM drop, max 50 RPM differential.
items.location: Lower left instrument panel â†’ Key-operated ignition switch

items.label: Carb Heat
items.how_to: Pull carb heat knob out to HOT, observe slight RPM drop, then push back to COLD.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Center knob

items.label: Engine Gauges
items.how_to: Check oil temperature and pressure are in the green arc, and RPM/fuel flow are normal.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Engine gauge cluster

items.label: Flaps
items.how_to: Set flaps to 0 or 10 degrees as appropriate using the flap lever.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Lower center, between pilot seats

items.label: Doors & Windows
items.how_to: Verify all doors and windows are fully closed and latched securely.
items.location: Cockpit â†’ Left and right cabin doors, windows

items.label: Transponder
items.how_to: Set transponder to ALT mode and enter the assigned squawk code.
items.location: Avionics stack â†’ Transponder unit, lower panel

items.label: Landing Light
items.how_to: Flip the landing light switch to ON for visibility.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Left side, light switch cluster

items.label: Strobe Lights
items.how_to: Flip the strobe light switch to ON before entering the runway.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Left side, light switch cluster

items.label: Throttle
items.how_to: Smoothly advance the throttle knob to full power while maintaining directional control with rudder.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Black knob, leftmost

items.label: Engine Instruments
items.how_to: Quickly scan engine gauges to confirm RPM, oil pressure, and oil temperature are in the green.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Engine gauge cluster

items.label: Rotate at Vr (55 KIAS)
items.how_to: At 55 KIAS, apply gentle back pressure on the yoke to lift the nose and become airborne.
items.location: Cockpit â†’ Yoke (control column)

items.label: Airspeed
items.how_to: Pitch to maintain best rate of climb speed (Vy) of 74 KIAS using the attitude indicator and airspeed indicator.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Airspeed indicator, top left of six-pack

items.label: Flaps
items.how_to: Retract flaps fully by moving the flap lever to the UP position once at a safe altitude and airspeed.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Lower center, between pilot seats

items.label: Mixture
items.how_to: Keep mixture full rich below 3000 feet. Above 3000 feet, lean as needed for smooth operation.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Red knob, right of throttle

items.label: Engine Gauges
items.how_to: Periodically check oil temperature, oil pressure, and RPM are in normal ranges during climb.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Engine gauge cluster

items.label: Power
items.how_to: Reduce throttle to the desired cruise RPM setting (typically 2100-2500 RPM).
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Black knob, leftmost

items.label: Mixture
items.how_to: Slowly pull the mixture knob aft to lean until slight RPM rise, then lean slightly further for economy.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Red knob, right of throttle

items.label: Elevator Trim
items.how_to: Roll the trim wheel to relieve control pressure and maintain level flight hands-off.
items.location: Cockpit â†’ Trim wheel between pilot seats

items.label: Landing Light
items.how_to: Switch the landing light off above 10,000 feet to extend bulb life.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Left side, light switch cluster

items.label: Fuel Quantity
items.how_to: Monitor fuel gauges periodically and compare against flight plan fuel burn estimates.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Lower left cluster, fuel gauges

items.label: Engine Gauges
items.how_to: Scan oil temperature, oil pressure, and fuel flow gauges for normal readings.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Engine gauge cluster

items.label: ATIS / Weather
items.how_to: Tune the destination ATIS frequency and listen for current weather, runway, and approach information.
items.location: Avionics stack â†’ COM2 radio or ATIS frequency

items.label: Altimeter
items.how_to: Set the altimeter to the destination airport's current altimeter setting from ATIS.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Altimeter adjustment knob

items.label: Mixture
items.how_to: Gradually push the mixture knob forward (richer) as you descend to lower altitudes.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Red knob, right of throttle

items.label: Carb Heat
items.how_to: Apply carb heat as needed when reducing power to prevent carburetor icing.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Center knob, pull out for HOT

items.label: Landing Light
items.how_to: Switch the landing light on for increased visibility below 10,000 feet.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Left side, light switch cluster

items.label: Fuel Selector
items.how_to: Confirm fuel selector is on BOTH for maximum fuel availability during approach.
items.location: Cabin floor â†’ Between front seats

items.label: Mixture
items.how_to: Push the mixture knob fully forward to FULL RICH for the approach.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Red knob, right of throttle

items.label: Carb Heat
items.how_to: Pull the carb heat knob fully out to the HOT position for the approach.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Center knob

items.label: Airspeed
items.how_to: Manage pitch and power to maintain 65-75 KIAS on approach, depending on wind conditions.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Airspeed indicator

items.label: Seats, Belts, Harnesses
items.how_to: Confirm all occupants' seat belts and shoulder harnesses are securely fastened.
items.location: Cockpit â†’ Pilot and passenger seats

items.label: Mixture
items.how_to: Push the mixture knob fully forward to FULL RICH position.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Red knob, right of throttle

items.label: Flaps
items.how_to: Extend flaps to FULL (30 degrees) using the flap lever.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Lower center, between pilot seats

items.label: Airspeed (Final)
items.how_to: Stabilize on final approach at 60-65 KIAS using pitch and power adjustments.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Airspeed indicator

items.label: Touchdown
items.how_to: Flare gently and touch down on the main wheels first, then lower the nose wheel.
items.location: Runway â†’ Main landing gear contact point

items.label: Braking
items.how_to: Apply smooth, progressive braking with the toe brakes after the nose wheel is on the ground.
items.location: Rudder pedals â†’ Top of each pedal (toe brakes)

items.label: Flaps
items.how_to: Move the flap lever fully up to retract flaps after clearing the runway.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Lower center, between pilot seats

items.label: Carb Heat
items.how_to: Push the carb heat knob fully in to the COLD (off) position.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Center knob

items.label: Landing Light
items.how_to: Switch the landing light off after clearing the runway.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Left side, light switch cluster

items.label: Strobe Lights
items.how_to: Switch the strobe light off after clearing the active runway.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Left side, light switch cluster

items.label: Transponder
items.how_to: Set the transponder to STANDBY mode after clearing the runway.
items.location: Avionics stack â†’ Transponder unit, lower panel

items.label: Parking Brake
items.how_to: Pull the parking brake handle fully aft and push down to lock.
items.location: Lower instrument panel â†’ Below center, pull handle

items.label: Throttle
items.how_to: Pull the throttle knob back to the full idle position.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Black knob, leftmost

items.label: Avionics Master
items.how_to: Switch the avionics master toggle OFF before turning off the master switch.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Lower center, red toggle switch

items.label: Mixture
items.how_to: Pull the red mixture knob fully aft to idle cutoff to shut down the engine.
items.location: Throttle quadrant â†’ Red knob, right of throttle

items.label: Magnetos
items.how_to: Turn the ignition key to the OFF position after the engine stops.
items.location: Lower left instrument panel â†’ Key-operated ignition switch

items.label: Master Switch
items.how_to: Push both halves of the master switch (BAT and ALT) to the OFF (down) position.
items.location: Lower left instrument panel â†’ Below left side gauges

items.label: All Lights
items.how_to: Turn off all exterior and interior light switches.
items.location: Instrument panel â†’ Left side, light switch cluster

items.label: Fuel Selector
items.how_to: Turn the fuel selector to LEFT or RIGHT (not OFF) for overnight storage to prevent cross-feeding.
items.location: Cabin floor â†’ Between front seats

items.label: Control Lock
items.how_to: Install the control lock over the yoke to prevent wind damage to control surfaces.
items.location: Cockpit â†’ Over the yoke (control column)
